neighborhoods.name: Third Ward / Downtown
neighborhoods.description: Historic warehouse district turned arts and dining hub with Milwaukee Public Market and riverwalk
neighborhoods.character: Warehouse arts district, Public Market, riverwalk

housing.predominantType: Converted lofts, condos, and modern apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Milwaukee. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Wauwatosa
neighborhoods.description: Inner-ring suburb with Village of Wauwatosa shopping, parks, and medical center campus
neighborhoods.character: Inner suburb, village shopping, medical center
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Milwaukee's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: West Allis
neighborhoods.description: Working-class inner suburb with Wisconsin State Fair Park, affordable housing, and diverse community

housing.predominantType: Bungalows, Cape Cods, and modest houses

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Brookfield / Elm Grove
neighborhoods.description: Western suburbs with Brookfield Square, excellent schools, and tree-lined residential streets
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
